quote: The silence here is worth more than any luxury I have paid for before. Zavari Haus redefined what I thought a stay could be.
author: Maryam A

quote: From arrival to departure, every detail was perfectly handled. The team makes everything effortless.
author: Hassan

quote: I have stayed in five-star hotels on three continents, but Zavari Haus is the only place I have returned to twice.
author: Zara
